children.text: Applicability of administrative procedure provisions; definitions

The provisions of subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5 shall apply to all agency action taken under this chapter, and the terms “agency” and “agency action” shall have the meaning specified in

children.text: The Commission shall provide for efficient and timely reviews and proceedings for the granting, suspending, revoking, or amending of any—
Pub. L. 118–67, div. B, title V, § 505(b)
This chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this Act”, meaning

children.tail: , known as the Atomic Energy Act of 1954, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under

children.text: “Subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5” substituted in subsec. (a) for the first reference to the Administrative Procedure Act on authority of

children.tail: , the first section of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees. “

” substituted for the second reference to the Administrative Procedure Act to reflect the codification of the definitions of “agency” and “agency action” in that section. Prior to the enactment of Title 5, the Administrative Procedure Act was classified to sections 1001 to 1011 of Title 5.

children.text: Provisions similar to subsec. (a) of this section were contained in section 1814(a), (c) of this title, prior to the general amendment and renumbering of act
